ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the professional */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the professional */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the professional */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the professional */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the professional */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the professional is associated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position or title of the professional */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location or office of the professional */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the contact was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the contact information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Official website domain of the company */,
  "industry" INTEGER /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal or zip code of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the company was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the company information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* The domain name of the company's website */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated company */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of domain verification */,
  "last_verified" TEXT /* Date the domain was last verified */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the domain was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the domain information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the industry was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the industry information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the system */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the contact */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_access_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact that was changed */,
  "changed_data" TEXT /* Data that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_history_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_reports_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domain_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain change */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain that was changed */,
  "old_domain" TEXT /* Old domain name */,
  "new_domain" TEXT /* New domain name */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the domain was changed */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_changes_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_changes_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact the note is for */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text content of the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_notes_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_notes_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact the tag is for */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the tag information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_tags_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
